prompt_definitions.name: initiative_planning
prompt_definitions.description: Guided strategic interview to plan and scaffold a new initiative with projects, bridges, decisions, tasks, and documents. Acts as a professional strategist helping extract maximum value.

arguments.name: initiative_idea
arguments.description: Optional starting description of the initiative idea

registry_index.summary: Decision governance — initiatives, projects, decisions, tasks, and bridges with approval workflows

tool_groups.name: Action Items
tool_groups.hint: Dashboard of prioritized work: pending approvals, assigned tasks, stalled decisions

tool_groups.name: Browse
tool_groups.hint: List and search initiatives, projects, decisions, tasks, and bridges

tool_groups.name: Details
tool_groups.hint: Get full entity details including status, approvals, and linked documents

tool_groups.name: Create & Update
tool_groups.hint: Create and modify initiatives, projects, decisions, tasks, and bridges

tool_groups.name: Documents
tool_groups.hint: Link documents to entities, search LudFlow docs, find entities by document

tool_rules.my_action_items: Returns prioritized action items as entity refs. Push results to decidr_list — the renderer fetches full data from the API. Drill into individual items with get_decision/get_task. For a visual dashboard overview, push directly to decidr_dashboard with just { organization_id } instead — no tool call needed.
tool_rules.list_initiatives: Use to discover all initiatives. Push to decidr_list. Use format=compact to save tokens. For a visual graph, push directly to decidr_graph with just { organization_id } — no tool call needed.
tool_rules.list_projects: Use to discover projects. Push to decidr_list. Filter by status to find active work. Use initiative_id to filter by initiative.
tool_rules.list_decisions: Use to discover decisions. Push to decidr_list. Call get_decision for full details including approval progress.
tool_rules.list_tasks: Use to discover tasks. Push to decidr_list. Filter by assigned_to_me=true for the user's work.
tool_rules.list_bridges: Use to discover cross-project bridges. Push to decidr_list.
tool_rules.get_initiative: Get full initiative details. Push to decidr_list for detail view.
tool_rules.get_project: Get full project details including task/decision/bridge counts. Push to decidr_list.
tool_rules.get_decision: Get full decision details including approval progress and linked documents. If status is IN_PROGRESS, tell user they can use update_decision with action: approve or reject. Check list_entity_documents for supporting context.
tool_rules.get_task: Get full task details. If status is TODO or IN_PROGRESS, user can use update_task with status: DONE. Push to decidr_list.
tool_rules.get_bridge: Get full bridge details including connected projects and decisions. Push to decidr_list.
tool_rules.search: Use when user describes something by name or keyword. Push results to decidr_list. Offer to drill into specific results with get_* tools.
tool_rules.create_initiative: Create a new initiative. Returns full created entity. Consider creating projects under it next.
tool_rules.create_project: Create a new project. Pass initiative_id to link to an initiative and member_ids to assign members. Returns full created entity. Consider adding decisions or tasks next.
tool_rules.create_decision: Create a new decision. Requires entity_type and matching parent ID. Returns full created entity. Consider linking supporting documents with link_document.
tool_rules.create_task: Create a new task. Returns full created entity. Consider assigning with update_task or linking a document.
tool_rules.create_bridge: Create a bridge between two projects. Returns full created entity.
tool_rules.update_initiative: Update initiative fields. Returns full updated entity.
tool_rules.update_project: Update project fields and/or transition status. Returns full updated entity.
tool_rules.update_decision: Update decision fields and/or transition status. Use action param for approve/reject/supersede/unsupersede. Returns full updated entity. Field updates applied before status transition.
tool_rules.update_task: Update task fields and/or transition status. Set status to DONE to complete a task. Returns full updated entity.
tool_rules.update_bridge: Update bridge fields and/or transition status. Returns full updated entity.
tool_rules.create_organization: Create a new organization. The caller becomes OWNER. Use manage_member to invite others.
tool_rules.list_organizations: List organizations the current user belongs to.
tool_rules.list_members: List all members of the current organization.
tool_rules.manage_member: Add, update role, or remove organization members. Use action: add with email, update_role with user_id+role, or remove with user_id.
tool_rules.link_document: Attach a document to any entity. Use type URL for external links, LUDFLOW for LudFlow documents. Search LudFlow docs first with search_ludflow_documents.
tool_rules.list_entity_documents: List all documents linked to an entity. Essential context before approving decisions.
tool_rules.search_ludflow_documents: Search LudFlow documents by title. Use results with link_document to attach to DecidR entities.
tool_rules.find_entities_by_ludflow_document: Find all DecidR entities linked to a LudFlow document. Enables bidirectional navigation.

renderer_definitions.name: decidr_list
renderer_definitions.description: Universal entity renderer — displays lists, details, search results, and action items with slide-out panels for navigation
renderer_definitions.rule: Use for all entity list, detail, and search views. Always use ref-only mode — pass entity type + ID, never full payloads.
renderer_definitions.data_hint: IMPORTANT: Always use ref-only mode. Pass entity references — the renderer fetches full data from the API. Format: { entities: [{ type: 'initiative'|'project'|'decision'|'task'|'bridge', id: string }], meta: { organization_id: string, result_count: number, tool_name: string } }. The tool_name determines rendering mode: 'list_decisions' for list view, 'get_decision' for detail view, 'my_action_items' for action items, 'search' for search results. Entity type names are singular lowercase. Never pass full entity payloads — only type and id.

renderer_definitions.name: decidr_dashboard
renderer_definitions.description: Full dashboard with initiative grouping, health bars, project cards, and prioritized action items
renderer_definitions.rule: Push directly to show the dashboard — do NOT call my_action_items or any other tool first. The renderer fetches all data from the API. Only pass organization_id. For fast access, push immediately when user asks for dashboard or overview.

renderer_definitions.name: decidr_graph
renderer_definitions.description: Force-directed SVG graph of projects and bridges with interactive nodes and semantic zoom
renderer_definitions.rule: Push directly when user asks for a visual map, graph, or diagram — do NOT call list_initiatives or any other tool first. The renderer fetches all data from the API. Only pass organization_id and optionally initiative_ids to scope the view. For fast access, push immediately.
renderer_definitions.invoke_schema: { "type": "object", "properties": { "initiative_ids": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" }, "description": "Initiative IDs to scope the graph view. Omit for all initiatives." } } }
